caption: A man with a grey, textured wig and glasses sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, a woman with bright pink hair wearing a green sequined dress stands partially visible. The studio walls feature a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed logo depicting a green shield. Two identical on-screen logos appear in each frame: one on the left reading "#BOSS TALK PODCAST" and another on the right reading "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains seated and continues talking, his mouth moving and his expression shifting slightly as he speaks. His right arm moves subtly toward the table as he communicates.
